examples: The victim's family is demanding compensation
The boss demanded that he be fired immediately
She demanded to see the manager

meanings.definition: require as useful, just, or proper
examples: It takes nerve to do what she did
This job asks a lot of patience and skill
This position demands a lot of personal sacrifice
This dinner calls for a spectacular dessert
This intervention does not postulate a patient's consent
The bank demanded payment of the loan

meanings.definition: requiring more than usually expected or thought due; especially great patience and effort and skill
examples: a baby can be so demanding
